name: convergo
description: Fresh-reviewer convergence workflow skills for planning, implementation, and review loops.

interface.shortDescription: Fresh-reviewer workflow skills for planning, implementation, and review loops.
interface.longDescription: Compound Converge packages the fresh-reviewer convergence protocol as native agent skills. Use cvg-plan and cvg-plan-review to stabilize a plan, cvg-work and cvg-code-review to stabilize an implementation, and Codex-only loop skills to coordinate real specialist threads with callback transport, heartbeat waiting, step-back classification, and a final fresh-reviewer exit gate.
defaultPrompt: /cvg-plan-loop create a plan for the issue
/cvg-code-review review my implementation against the plan
